sources_used: public page fetch markdown (LoCG week page layout)

measured_thumbnail_partial_dom.label: Thumbnail View (saved capture, extend_calls=0, data-extend-now=1)
measured_thumbnail_partial_dom.note: Variants exist in DOM but are class variant-collapsed hidden; UI shows +N toggles.

projected_after_full_pagination.parent_issue_rows: ~15-50 (depends on filter; 15 in first chunk only)
projected_after_full_pagination.closest_to_spreadsheet_234: full paginated total_li_issue_rows (all li.issue including variants)

text_list_view_hypothesis.user_observation: Text List View appears to show all releases
text_list_view_hypothesis.public_page_fetch: Flat publisher/title lines list every variant inline (matches expanded text UX)
text_list_view_hypothesis.mechanism: ComicList.loadList() + GET /comic/get_comics with view=text (same as thumbs/list, different view param)
text_list_view_hypothesis.likely_difference: Text view renders variant rows without hidden/collapsed styling so counts visible to user match total_li_issue_rows

api_behavior.view_param: view=thumbs | list | text (from data-view on block + toolbar)
api_behavior.separate_api_per_view: same endpoint, view query param differs

separate_variants_toggle.note: No 'Separate Variants' label in anonymous capture; may be logged-in preference (.filter-options-preference). Format filter 'Variants & Reprints' (data-id=2) controls inclusion in list query.

detailed_view_count.expected: same API row set as thumbnail; different markup (list vs thumbs)

separate_variants_off.proxy_test: deselect Format > Variants & Reprints in filters (changes list query, not measured)

separate_variants_on.current_capture: variants in DOM as separate li rows (153) but hidden in thumbnail UI

closest_to_spreadsheet_234.winner: Full paginated release list counting every li.issue row (parents + variants), regardless of view, after get_comics extend completes

recommended_capture_settings.reason: Aligns with user-visible full release list; variants not collapsed/hidden in UI
recommended_capture_settings.still_required: Run full get_comics pagination before counting or persisting
